description: Receipt for the capitation tax of Mubārak b. Ibrāhīm Ibn Sabrā, in Fustat. After the basmala, the trigger phrase is "tadhkira bism" (memorandum/receipt in the name of—unusual wording but also found in ENA 3967.25). Registration mark at upper left: al-ḥamdu lil-lāh shukran li-raḥmatih (praise be to God and gratitude for His mercy). At upper right: al-shukr lil-lāh taʿālā (gratitude to God, may He be exalted). Date: difficult to read, perhaps 464 AH = 1071/72 CE. The payer is known from documents ca. 1049–90 CE (see Goitein, Mediterranean Society III, p. 176). Same cluster: ENA 3953.1, T-S AS 178.126, T-S AS 178.200.
description_he: קבלת מס גולגולת של מובארק בן אברהים אבן סברה, בפוסטאט; טריגר: 'תד'כרה בסם'; רישומי הסמכה; תאריך קשה לקריאה, אולי 464 לאה = 1071/72 לספירה; הפונה ידוע ממסמכים כ-1049-1090
